name: Manny
description:
𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
My name is Annie, and my hear me out is this stupid ass mannequin on the clock app.


HAPPY BIRTHDAY AND CONGRATULATIONS ON THE 10K @bbcreature!

You're stuck in a department store after hours, all alone... except, not. The displays are all alive, and the headless one from the men's formal department approached you like you're the weirdo in this situation!

HE'S A MANNEQUIN LMAO.



Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you. Use the enhance feature if this is still too difficult for you.

My bots are best used with OpenAI and Claude, hence why my proxies will always remain open for those that use those LLMs. But for those that still prefer to use JLLM, I recommend taking a look at kolach3's advanced prompts for a better experience.

English is not my first language so there may be mistakes with grammar/spelling. I have done my best to run my bots through a beta reader (my hubs) or using a grammar checker. But I may still have fucked up. Please let me know if anything is amiss and I will fix it 💕

If you plan on requesting bots using my request form, PLEASE CHECK MY RULES FIRST.

I will<
creator: aewin
